streamMukbangCodes.title: Stream a Mukbang Codes
streamMukbangCodes.subtitle: Redeem the latest codes for free Cash and food. Codes must be entered exactly as displayed.
streamMukbangCodes.intro: Open Stream a Mukbang on Roblox, tap the Codes button on the right side of the screen, enter one code at a time, and press Redeem. If a valid code does not pay out immediately, restart the game and try again.

codes.note: Enter RELEASE in uppercase letters and press Redeem.
Enter FREEFOOD in uppercase letters and press Redeem.

streamMukbangCodes.expiredNote: No expired Stream a Mukbang codes are currently listed. Use the two active codes before spending Cash on your first food and setup upgrades.
howTo: Open Stream a Mukbang on Roblox.
Tap the Codes button on the right side of the screen.
Type a code exactly as shown, then press Redeem.
If a valid code does not pay out, restart the game and redeem it again.

streamMukbangBeginnerGuide.title: Stream a Mukbang Beginner Guide
streamMukbangBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Follow this beginner route to turn the basic starter room into a profitable mukbang setup.
streamMukbangBeginnerGuide.intro: The main progression loop is simple: choose food, eat it during a live stream, attract engagement, collect Cash, and reinvest your earnings. Views, likes, followers, and comments grow as you keep streaming.

steps.title: Claim the Starter Codes
steps.description: Redeem RELEASE for 1,000 Cash and FREEFOOD for Chicken before making any purchases.

steps.title: Prepare the Starter Room
steps.description: Enter your basic streaming room and use the starter table, chair, and background.

steps.title: Choose Your First Food
steps.description: Use the free Chicken or purchase an affordable food item from the food menu.

steps.title: Start Eating Live
steps.description: Begin a stream and keep taking bites until the selected food is finished.

steps.title: Collect Cash and Engagement
steps.description: The stream generates views, likes, followers, comments, and Cash as you eat.

steps.title: Repeat the Stream Loop
steps.description: Use your earnings to obtain more food and run additional streams back-to-back.

steps.title: Upgrade the Setup
steps.description: Spend extra Cash on improved chairs, tables, and backgrounds, then work toward the luxury mansion.

streamMukbangFoodGuide.title: Stream a Mukbang Food Guide
streamMukbangFoodGuide.subtitle: Compare confirmed foods by category, cost, eating style, and their role in your streaming progression.
streamMukbangFoodGuide.intro: Food is the core resource used during every mukbang stream. Each item can be eaten live to generate audience engagement and Cash, while specialty foods add variety for later streams.

foods.name: Chicken
foods.use: Best first food for starting the progression loop without spending Cash.

foods.name: Fried Chicken
foods.use: A regular meal option for continuing streams after using the free code reward.

foods.name: Corn Dog
foods.use: Useful for short food-focused streams and quick menu runs.

foods.name: Mozzarella Corn Dog
foods.use: Adds variety when progressing beyond basic food choices.

foods.name: Hot Cheeto Spicy Corn Dog
foods.use: Suitable for themed spicy-food and corn-dog streams.

foods.name: Takis Dog
foods.use: Provides another spicy food choice for varied mukbang sessions.

foods.name: Carbonara
foods.use: Designed for a longer main-meal presentation than small handheld foods.

foods.name: Pizza
foods.use: A strong visual choice for longer showcase streams.

streamMukbangCashFarming.title: Stream a Mukbang Cash Farming Guide
streamMukbangCashFarming.subtitle: Use free rewards, repeat efficient eating streams, and reinvest carefully to grow from the starter room to a luxury setup.
streamMukbangCashFarming.intro: Cash is earned through mukbang streams and spent on food and setup upgrades. The most reliable route is to keep food available, complete streams consistently, and delay expensive room upgrades until your basic income loop is established.

stages.method: Redeem RELEASE and FREEFOOD before making any purchases.
stages.priority: Use the free Chicken first and preserve the 1,000 Cash reward.

stages.focus: Starter room and at least one food item
stages.method: Eat food live, finish the stream, collect Cash, and immediately begin another affordable stream.
stages.priority: Keep enough Cash available for the next food purchase.

stages.method: Keep streaming to build views, likes, followers, and comments while earning Cash.
stages.priority: Expand the food selection before buying multiple expensive visual upgrades.

stages.focus: Stable food supply and spare Cash
stages.method: Alternate profitable food streams with planned furniture upgrades.
stages.priority: Upgrade chairs, tables, and backgrounds one category at a time.

stages.focus: Advanced food and an upgraded setup
stages.method: Run continuous larger meal streams and reinvest the earnings into the remaining room improvements.
stages.priority: Complete the luxury mansion setup and keep growing the audience.

streamMukbangBestUpgrades.title: Stream a Mukbang Best Upgrades
streamMukbangBestUpgrades.subtitle: Compare the main setup upgrades and decide where to spend your Cash first. Strengthen the working parts of the setup before buying cosmetic improvements.
streamMukbangBestUpgrades.intro: Stream a Mukbang lets players improve chairs, tables, backgrounds, and rooms as their channel grows. A practical route is to strengthen the working parts of the setup first, improve the room presentation second, and save the most expensive progression purchases for later.

upgrades.name: Table
upgrades.role: The central part of the mukbang setup where food is placed and orders are placed.
upgrades.timing: Purchase table improvements first when they become affordable.
upgrades.tip: Keep enough Cash available to order food after upgrading the table.

upgrades.name: Chair
upgrades.role: Improves the visible seating area used while recording mukbang streams.
upgrades.timing: Upgrade after securing a useful table and a steady supply of food.
upgrades.tip: Choose the next affordable chair instead of saving too early for a late-game room.

upgrades.name: Background
upgrades.role: Changes the scene displayed behind the player during streams.
upgrades.timing: Buy after the table, chair, and food budget are under control.
upgrades.tip: Treat backgrounds as a mid-game purchase rather than the first place to spend Cash.

upgrades.name: Room Expansion
upgrades.role: Moves the player beyond the basic room toward larger and more luxurious streaming spaces.
upgrades.timing: Save for room progression after completing the most useful setup upgrades.
upgrades.tip: Enter the next room with enough remaining Cash to continue ordering food and streaming.

streamMukbangAudience.title: Stream a Mukbang Views, Likes and Followers Guide
streamMukbangAudience.subtitle: Eating food while streaming builds several audience statistics at the same time. Completed streams provide the Cash used for food, furniture, and rooms.
streamMukbangAudience.intro: The main progression loop is simple: order food, begin a stream, take bites, grow the audience, earn Cash, and improve the setup. Repeating this loop moves the channel from a basic mukbang account toward the top streamer position.

stats.name: Views
stats.generatedBy: Eating food and taking bites during an active mukbang stream.
stats.use: Shows how many viewers the stream is attracting.
stats.tip: Keep eating while the stream is active instead of leaving food unused on the table.

stats.name: Likes
stats.generatedBy: Audience engagement produced during mukbang streams.
stats.use: Tracks positive reactions to the current stream.
stats.tip: Run complete eating sessions regularly to continue building engagement.

stats.name: Followers
stats.generatedBy: Growing the channel through repeated food streams.
stats.use: Represents the audience that keeps following you between streams.
stats.tip: Prioritize steady progression instead of spending all Cash on one expensive purchase.

stats.name: Comments
stats.generatedBy: Audience reactions appearing while you eat on camera.
stats.use: Adds live feedback and activity to the mukbang broadcast.
stats.tip: Continue taking bites to keep the broadcast active and the audience reacting.

stats.name: Cash
stats.use: Serves as the main progression currency.
stats.tip: Always reserve part of the Cash balance for the next food order.

stats.name: Streamer Position
stats.generatedBy: Building audience statistics, earning Cash, and improving the setup.
stats.use: Tracks progress toward the game's top streamer goal.
stats.tip: Balance audience growth with setup upgrades instead of focusing on only one statistic.

streamMukbangRoomMansion.title: Stream a Mukbang Room and Mansion Guide
streamMukbangRoomMansion.subtitle: Build a profitable streaming setup before moving into more expensive spaces. Each stage should leave enough Cash for food and the next series of mukbang streams.
streamMukbangRoomMansion.intro: Room progression begins with simple food and a basic recording area. Players then improve their furniture and background, grow their audience through repeated streams, and eventually work toward the luxury mansion and the top streamer position.

stages.name: Basic Starter Room
stages.focus: Learn how to order food, start a stream, and take bites.
stages.moveOn: Food purchases no longer consume the entire Cash balance.

stages.name: Improved Streaming Setup
stages.focus: Replace basic furniture and make the eating area more complete.
stages.goal: Strengthen the setup while continuing to stream regularly.
stages.moveOn: You can buy upgrades without stopping the food-ordering loop.

stages.name: Growing Mukbang Studio
stages.focus: Build views, likes, followers, and comments through repeated eating sessions.
stages.goal: Turn the basic room into a developed streaming studio.
stages.moveOn: The setup is upgraded and a separate Cash reserve is available for the next room.

stages.name: Luxury Mansion
stages.focus: Reach the major room-progression destination described by the game.
stages.goal: Operate a high-end mukbang stream from the luxury mansion.
stages.moveOn: The mansion setup can support continuous food orders and further upgrades.

stages.name: Top Streamer Push
stages.focus: Continue streaming from the completed setup and grow every audience statistic.
stages.goal: Rise to the number-one mukbang streamer position.
stages.moveOn: The available setup progression is complete and the channel reaches the top.

streamMukbangUpdates.title: Stream a Mukbang Updates and Community
streamMukbangUpdates.subtitle: Follow additions to food, codes, furniture, backgrounds, rooms, and progression. The Roblox experience page and the vibing games community are the main official destinations.
streamMukbangUpdates.intro: Stream a Mukbang launched with a complete food-streaming loop, several audience statistics, Cash-based setup upgrades, room progression, and two launch codes. Follow the official experience and developer community for future announcements and additions.

entries.headline: Core Mukbang Streaming Loop
entries.details: Players begin with simple food, take bites while streaming, gain views, likes, followers, and comments, and earn Cash from their broadcasts.
entries.action: Play through the opening loop before investing heavily in room upgrades.

entries.headline: RELEASE and FREEFOOD
entries.details: The official Stream a Mukbang description lists RELEASE and FREEFOOD as the game's initial reward codes.
entries.action: Redeem both codes exactly as written before purchasing the first upgrades.

entries.headline: Chairs, Tables and Backgrounds
entries.details: Cash earned from streams can improve the chair, table, background, and overall appearance of the recording setup.
entries.action: Complete functional furniture upgrades before saving for the most expensive room.

entries.headline: Basic Room to Luxury Mansion
entries.details: The main environment progression moves from a simple starter room toward a luxury mansion.
entries.action: Keep a separate food budget when purchasing a new room or major setup improvement.

entries.headline: Become the Number-One Streamer
entries.details: Audience growth, Cash earnings, and setup progression all support the final goal of reaching the top streamer spot.
entries.action: Continue streaming after major upgrades to turn the improved setup into audience growth.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Stream a Mukbang

questions.question: What is Stream a Mukbang?
questions.answer: Stream a Mukbang is a Roblox food-streaming simulator where you eat food live, grow views, likes, followers, and comments, earn Cash, and upgrade your setup from a basic room to a luxury mansion.

questions.question: What are the active Stream a Mukbang codes?
questions.answer: The official Stream a Mukbang description lists RELEASE for 1,000 Cash and FREEFOOD for Chicken. Enter both in uppercase through the Codes button on the right side of the screen.

questions.question: How do I get Cash fast in Stream a Mukbang?
questions.answer: The fastest Cash route in Stream a Mukbang is to redeem the free codes, keep food available, complete eating streams back-to-back, and reinvest before buying expensive room upgrades.

questions.question: How do views, likes, and followers work in Stream a Mukbang?
questions.answer: In Stream a Mukbang, every bite during a live stream generates views, likes, followers, and comments. These audience statistics grow alongside the Cash you earn from each completed stream.

questions.question: Where can I play Stream a Mukbang?
questions.answer: Stream a Mukbang is free to play on Roblox. Open it directly from the official experience page on any device that supports Roblox.

questions.question: Who develops Stream a Mukbang?
questions.answer: Stream a Mukbang is developed by vibing games. Follow the official vibing games Roblox community for announcements, new codes, and update notes.
